text: 27 xii) MCC auxiliary control panel a) Breaker 2 sets b) Power contacts 2 sets c) Auxiliary relays 1 set d) Over load relay 1 set e) Power fuse 1 set f) Contact fuse 1 set g) Control terminal block 1 set Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 28 9.2 STEAM TURBINE AND AUXILIARIES (FOR EACH UNIT) 9.2.1 Steam Turbine i) Front bearing (complete set of bearing assembly including 1set torous, intermediate pieces sole / base plate and all other fixing/ assembly materials required to complete one bearing assembly except housing) ii) Front pedestal oil guard ring (complete set of oil guard 1 set assembly for front and rear with fixing material) iii) High Pressure (HP) shaft seals (complete set of interstage seals 1 set of all the stages of moving blades of HP rotor with fixing material) iv) HP shaft gland seals (complete set for replacement of front 1 set and rear with fixing material) v) Sealing of HP casing assembly (1 set should comprise of sealing 1 set segments, fitted keys, pins, caulking material and interstage sealings of all the stationary rows) vi) Sealing of HP inlet and HP e xhaust assembly (sealing rings, 1set lockwashers, connecting nuts/ capnuts between pipe and casing) vii) HP turbine first stage stationary and moving blades with 1 set assembly material viii) HP outer and inner casing fasteners and fixing materials 20% of each type and size ix) HP/IP combined thrust and journal bearing (complete with 1 set torous, intermediate pieces so le/base plate and all other fixing / assembly materials required to complete thrust and journal bearings assembly except housing) x) HP/IP pedestal oil guard ring (complete set of oil guard 1 set assembly for front and rear with fixing material) xi) HP/IP shaft coupling bolts, nuts, lock washers, 1 set pins, screws, coupling guards xii) Sealing of IP casing assembly (1 set should consist of 1 set sealing segments, fitted keys, caulking material, pins, cap screws and interstage sealing of all the stationary rows) xiii) IP turbine shaft seals (complete set of interstage seals of 1 set all the stages of moving blades of IP rotor with fixing material) Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 29
